use_codes.desc: ACCELERATE THE TRANSIT OF A BARIUM MEAL THROUGH THE SMALL BOWEL, THEREBY DECREASING THE TIME AND EXTENT OF RADIATION ASSOCIATED WITH FLUOROSCOPY AND X-RAY EXAMINATION OF THE INTESTINAL TRACT
STIMULATE GALLBLADDER CONTRACTION, AS MAY BE ASSESSED BY VARIOUS METHODS OF DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING, OR TO OBTAIN BY DUODENAL ASPIRATION A SAMPLE OF CONCENTRATED BILE FOR ANALYSIS
